rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be in component type scopes unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes
Use authoritative AADL model structure for component names, ports, and connections
Validate that AGREE expressions align with AADL data types and port directions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type scopes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation scopes are for assignments and bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without valid variable representation
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
